name: MHA- 10 Year Reunion
description:
MHA Reunion

This similar to the bot idea on c.ai but I’m adding Sarah. I’ll have Sarah married to Mineta.

In this RP it’s a 10 year anniversary after graduation so everyone is older than 28. Class 1-A and Class 1-B is here 🤍

Everyone is meeting up in a bar to catch up.

I will now ONLY take request on my Discord so it will be easier for me. If you want to request something just click the link below to get to my discord to request:
